channel.title: GitHub Emacs Lisp Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Emacs Lisp in GitHub

item.title: syl20bnr/spacemacs
item.description: A community-driven Emacs distribution - The best editor is neither Emacs nor Vim, it's Emacs *and* Vim!

item.title: doomemacs/doomemacs
item.description: An Emacs framework for the stubborn martian hacker

item.title: emacs-lsp/lsp-mode
item.description: Emacs client/library for the Language Server Protocol

item.title: positron-solutions/dslide
item.description: Present anything Emacs can do with programmable, extensible, configurable slides & presentation steps made from org mode headings

item.title: melpa/melpa
item.description: Recipes and build machinery for the biggest Emacs package repo

item.title: purcell/emacs-reformatter
item.description: Define commands which run reformatters on the current Emacs buffer

item.title: lewang/ws-butler
item.description: Unobtrusively trim extraneous white-space *ONLY* in lines edited.

item.title: magit/magit
item.description: It's Magit! A Git Porcelain inside Emacs.

item.title: atomontage/xterm-color
item.description: ANSI & xterm-256 color text property translator for Emacs

item.title: joaotavora/eglot
item.description: A client for Language Server Protocol servers
